headline: Synopsys: Ansys Integration Has Reinforced The Quality Growth Story
summary: Synopsys (SNPS) outlook: Ansys deal boosts TAM to $31B amid AI tailwinds; catalysts, valuation, and key risks (debt, IP, geopolitics).
